Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about Ripley Support

What is the Ripley Support?

An automated Discord ticket system with AI-powered support capabilities that helps manage customer inquiries efficiently and provide 24/7 support.

How much does premium cost?

Premium subscription costs $6.99/month with a 30-day money-back guarantee. Try our free tier first to experience the basic features.

Can I customize Discord tickets?

Yes! Use custom panels to configure ticket types and workflows to match your server's needs. Premium users also get AI customization options.

How does the AI ticket system work?

Our AI understands user queries and provides instant responses based on your server's knowledge base. Complex issues are automatically escalated to your staff team.

How do I report bugs?

Visit our Support Server to report any issues. Our team is always ready to help!

Is there a limit to tickets?

No, both our free and premium plans offer unlimited tickets. Premium adds enhanced management features like auto-closing inactive tickets.

The Complete AI Ticket Support Solution

Ripley Support is designed to revolutionize how Discord communities handle support. From gaming servers to education communities, NFT projects to developer groups, our Discord ticket bot provides the tools you need to deliver exceptional support experiences.

Unlike other Discord bots, our AI-powered ticket system intelligently handles inquiries, learns from interactions, and gets smarter over time. With both free and premium tiers, servers of all sizes can benefit from automated support.
